mood_aesthetic.title: Premium Experiential Storytelling
mood_aesthetic.description: Sophisticated behind-the-scenes content that showcases the craft and scale of world-class exhibitions. Clean, cinematic visuals that balance artistic creativity with business results.
mood_aesthetic.visual_direction: High-contrast imagery with dramatic lighting, showcasing both intimate design details and grand-scale installations

content_pillars.name: Behind the Build
content_pillars.description: Time-lapse construction, design process reveals, and team expertise showcases

content_pillars.name: Impact by Numbers
content_pillars.description: Client results, visitor metrics, and ROI case studies with visual data
example_topics: $2M revenue generated for Harry Potter exhibition

content_pillars.name: Visitor Experience Magic
content_pillars.description: Capturing authentic visitor reactions and immersive moments

platform_strategy.role: Primary brand showcase and lead generation hub
key_tactics: Cross-promote exhibition content to main brand
Story highlights for each major project

platform_strategy.role: B2B relationship building and thought leadership
platform_strategy.content_mix: 50% industry insights, 30% case studies, 20% team expertise
key_tactics: CEO thought leadership on experiential ROI

reference_examples.description: Construction time-lapse content with overlay metrics (days to complete, square footage, team size)
reference_examples.why_it_works: Combines satisfying visual progression with concrete business data
reference_examples.how_we_adapt: Apply to exhibition builds with visitor capacity and revenue projections

reference_examples.description: Split-screen before/after reveals of exhibition spaces
reference_examples.why_it_works: Dramatic transformation showcases expertise and scale
reference_examples.how_we_adapt: Empty venue to full immersive experience with visitor count overlays

reference_examples.description: Client testimonial videos with revenue/attendance graphics
reference_examples.why_it_works: Social proof backed by measurable results

color_visual_treatment.treatment_notes: Dark backgrounds for premium feel, gold accents for key metrics and CTAs only
color_visual_treatment.typography_direction: Clean sans-serif for data, elegant serif for brand moments
color_visual_treatment.filter_style: High contrast with warm undertones, cinematic color grading for video content
